name: EUR/BRL Quarterly Average Rate
why_it_matters: Latin America is 37% of group; BRL depreciation was the single largest FX drag in 2025 at -9.3%
data_source: ECB Euro foreign exchange reference rates — daily publication
sensitivity_coefficient: 1% BRL depreciation vs EUR ≈ -0.37% drag on reported group turnover (LatAm ~37%).
threshold_early: quarterly avg EUR/BRL <= 6.0 for 4 consecutive weeks
threshold_confirm: quarterly avg EUR/BRL <= 5.8 for 8 consecutive weeks
threshold_break: quarterly avg EUR/BRL >= 6.5 for 4 consecutive weeks
thesis_action_on_confirm: flag FX tailwind forming, upgrade reported turnover estimate for LatAm
thesis_action_on_break: flag FX headwind intensifying, reduce reported turnover estimate, monitor thesis coherence

name: EUR/INR Quarterly Average Rate
why_it_matters: India is fastest growing major market; INR depreciated 7.7% in 2025 masking strong underlying performance; HUL reports 6 weeks before group
data_source: ECB Euro foreign exchange reference rates — daily publication
sensitivity_coefficient: 1% INR depreciation vs EUR ≈ -0.13% drag on reported group turnover (India ~13%).
threshold_early: quarterly avg EUR/INR <= 94.0 for 4 consecutive weeks
threshold_confirm: quarterly avg EUR/INR <= 90.0 for 8 consecutive weeks
threshold_break: quarterly avg EUR/INR >= 100.0 for 4 consecutive weeks
thesis_action_on_confirm: flag India FX tailwind, upgrade reported contribution estimate
thesis_action_on_break: flag India FX drag, note divergence between underlying and reported performance

name: EUR/USD Quarterly Average Rate
why_it_matters: North America is 22% of group and highest margin geography; USD depreciated 3.6% in 2025
data_source: ECB Euro foreign exchange reference rates — daily publication
sensitivity_coefficient: 1% USD depreciation vs EUR ≈ -0.20% drag on reported group turnover (NA ~22%).
threshold_early: quarterly avg EUR/USD >= 1.12 for 4 consecutive weeks
threshold_confirm: quarterly avg EUR/USD >= 1.15 for 8 consecutive weeks
threshold_break: quarterly avg EUR/USD <= 1.02 for 4 consecutive weeks
thesis_action_on_confirm: flag NA FX headwind, reduce reported NA contribution estimate
thesis_action_on_break: flag USD strength as reported turnover tailwind for NA

name: Hindustan Unilever Quarterly USG
why_it_matters: HUL results published approximately 6 weeks before Unilever group results; India USG is directly predictive of group emerging markets performance
data_source: Hindustan Unilever Limited quarterly results — BSE/NSE filing
sensitivity_coefficient: HUL results lead group by ~6 weeks and are predictive for emerging markets performance.
threshold_confirm: HUL USG >= 5.0% for 2 consecutive quarters with volume >= 3%
threshold_break: HUL USG <= 2.0% for 1 quarter or volume negative for 1 quarter
thesis_action_on_confirm: elevate thesis to building — India acceleration confirmed with 6 week lead
thesis_action_on_break: flag India deceleration — review emerging markets contribution to thesis

name: Group Underlying Volume Growth
why_it_matters: Volume-led growth is management's stated strategic priority and the market's primary re-rating trigger; price-only growth signals demand weakness
sensitivity_coefficient: 1pp higher volume growth ≈ +0.4 to +0.5pp underlying operating margin via fixed cost leverage (observed 2023–2025).
threshold_break: group UVG <= 0.5% for 1 quarter or negative for any quarter
thesis_action_on_break: flag volume stall — thesis coherence review required

name: Group Underlying Sales Growth
why_it_matters: Primary top-line metric excluding currency and disposals; 2026 guidance is 4-6% with at least 2% volume
sensitivity_coefficient: USG is the primary top-line metric; sustained >4.5% with positive volume is a re-rating condition.
thesis_action_on_break: guidance miss risk flagged — reduce conviction score

name: Underlying Operating Margin
why_it_matters: Management guided modest improvement above 20.0% in 2026; margin expansion is a re-rating catalyst for consumer staples
data_source: Unilever quarterly and annual results — company filing
sensitivity_coefficient: Margin expansion is a key catalyst; deterioration below ~19.5% signals cost pressure / weaker execution.
thesis_action_on_confirm: margin expansion confirmed — upgrade EPS estimate
thesis_action_on_break: margin pressure flagged — review cost assumptions

name: Palm Oil Price — Bursa Malaysia FCPO
why_it_matters: Palm oil is primary input cost for Home Care and Personal Care; price movements flow through to gross margin with approximately 1-2 quarter lag
data_source: Bursa Malaysia Crude Palm Oil Futures (FCPO) — daily
sensitivity_coefficient: 10% FCPO increase ≈ 20–30bps gross margin headwind with ~1–2 quarter lag (observed via mgmt commentary).
thesis_action_on_confirm: flag gross margin headwind building — lag 1-2 quarters
thesis_action_on_break: flag gross margin tailwind — commodity deflation supportive

name: Productivity Programme Cumulative Savings
why_it_matters: €130m remaining savings to be delivered in 2026; delivery supports overhead reduction and margin expansion independent of revenue
data_source: Unilever interim and full year results — company filing
threshold_early: cumulative savings >= 0.75bn confirmed in H1 2026 update
threshold_confirm: full €0.80bn target confirmed delivered by full year 2026
threshold_break: management withdraws or qualifies savings delivery timeline
thesis_action_on_confirm: overhead reduction thesis intact — structural margin improvement confirmed
thesis_action_on_break: flag productivity programme risk — review margin assumptions

name: EUR/BRL Composite FX Impact Estimate
why_it_matters: Synthesises all currency movements into a single pre-announcement estimate of FX impact on reported group turnover — calculable daily before company reports
data_source: ECB reference rates — daily; computed using geographic revenue weights from most recent annual report
sensitivity_coefficient: 1pp improvement in FX basket ≈ +0.5pp improvement in reported turnover growth (roughly linear in normal ranges).
threshold_early: composite FX impact >= -3.0% for current quarter vs prior year
threshold_confirm: composite FX impact >= -1.5% for current quarter vs prior year
threshold_break: composite FX impact <= -6.0% for current quarter vs prior year
thesis_action_on_confirm: FX headwind moderating — reported numbers will better reflect underlying performance
thesis_action_on_break: FX headwind intensifying — reported turnover decline despite good underlying growth
notes: Computed: weighted basket of currency % changes using geographic revenue weights (LatAm/India/NA/Indonesia/China/other EM).
